results.title: Second Largest Number in Array
results.description: Write a program to find the second largest number in an array.
results.code:
# Write your solution here
# Static input
arr = [106, 14, 46, 47, 94, 52, 86, 36, 99, 101]

# Remove duplicates and sort the array
unique_arr = list(set(arr))
unique_arr.sort(reverse=True)

# Second largest element
second_largest = unique_arr[1]

# Output
print(second_largest)

results.title: Move Zeros to End
results.description: Write a program to move all zeros to the right end of the array without changing the relative order of other elements.
results.code:
# Static input
arr = [1, 2, 0, 4, 3, 0, 5, 0]

# List to store non-zero elements
result = []

# Count zeros
zero_count = 0

for num in arr:
    if num != 0:
        result.append(num)
    else:
        zero_count += 1

# Append zeros at the end
result.extend([0] * zero_count)

# Output
print(result)
